global_description: A small, slender seabird with a streamlined body and pointed wings. It has a predominantly white plumage with a contrasting black cap on the head and a yellow bill. The wings are gray with black tips, and the tail is forked.

part_details.head: White with a distinct black cap covering the top and back.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, gray with black tips.
part_details.body: Streamlined, predominantly white with some gray on the back.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the top of the head.
The yellow bill protrudes from the front of the head.
The gray wings extend from the sides of the body.
The forked tail is positioned at the rear of the body.
